overview.description: Real-time AI sales coaching for B2B technical sales teams
overview.description_long: DeltaGen builds software that runs invisibly during live sales calls, coaching reps through discovery and delivering instant answers to technical and competitive questions sourced from the company's own knowledge base. Its flagship product, Virtual SE, acts as an invisible AI sales engineer on a rep's screen — answering technical questions in under 3 seconds, prompting MEDDPICC qualification questions, and writing qualification data back to the CRM automatically. No bot joins the meeting; prospects never know it's there. The system is trained on 10,000+ real B2B sales conversations and holds SOC 2 Type II and GDPR certifications.
overview.tagline: Real-time AI sales coaching for B2B technical sales teams

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague, Czech Republic; operating across the United States and the Czech Republic. Backed by Techstars accelerator.

key_milestones.event: Backed by Techstars, B5 Capital, and Forward VC
Launched Virtual SE flagship product; reached $120K ARR in 60-day Early Access Program
Projected $500K ARR by end of Q4 2025

metadata.notes: Company branded as 'DeltaGen' on website/LinkedIn; LinkedIn handle and press coverage use 'DeltaGenAI'. Press release (Nov 28, 2025) lists Prague, Czech Republic as origin; LinkedIn company address shows San Francisco, CA 94103. Described as 'early-stage startup operating across the United States and the Czech Republic'. Revenue: $120K ARR achieved in 60-day Early Access Program (Nov 2025); company projected $500K ARR by end of Q4 2025. Notable customer quote from John Roberts, Head of Sales at Digital.ai.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Works in commoditizing space (generative_ai, automation, nlp) but has some differentiation through proprietary tech or customer base.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Small team with no visible customer traction or market validation signals.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known funding and very small team. High dependency on bootstrapped revenue or future fundraising.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Multiple high-risk factors across AGI displacement, market, or funding dimensions.
